reasoning: This animation sequence depicts a couple embracing, using both arms to create a heart-like shape.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, conveying affection and closeness. Frame 3: The arms fully embrace, forming a heart shape around the center. Frame 4: The arms maintain the embrace, conveying a sense of lasting affection. Frame 5: The arms slowly return to a relaxed position, leaving a lingering sense of warmth and connection.  I will use joint1 to control the outward/inward rotation, and joint2 to control the upward/downward pitch of the arms.
